name: Shree Rama Newsprint Limited
summary: Shree Rama Newsprint Limited manufactures and sells newsprint, and writing and printing papers in India. The company also offers photocopier paper; and packaged drinking water. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Rama Newsprint and Papers Limited and changed its name to Shree Rama Newsprint Limited in June 2013. Shree Rama Newsprint Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
